responseMessageContents.text:
## Goal
- Fix Samsung Android chat keyboard failure on `chat.ivxholding.com/home`, fix Android OTA crash (`java.io.IOException: Failed to download remote update`), build a working release APK, and fix Android reels crash when opening reel module

## Constraints & Preferences
- Store ALL timestamps in UTC only; convert to local only for display
- Owner account must NEVER sign in automatically — manual email + password required on every launch
- App colors must match landing page — `#FFD700` gold, `#00C48C` green, `#FF4D4D` red, `#4A90D9` blue
- Do not change Android package name (`com.ivxholdings.app`) or iOS bundle identifier
- Do not create new project, replace IVX, reset repo, switch to localhost, or add Rork dependencies
- Birthday field REQUIRED (MM/DD/YYYY, age 18-120, stored as `dateOfBirth` ISO YYYY-MM-DD)
- Gender field REQUIRED — chip selector: Male / Female / Prefer not to say
- Landing QA: do not mark production ready because routes return 200; require live evidence
- Expo Go: do not create new project, do not run create-expo-app, do not remove production modules
- CORS must allow only: `https://ivxholding.com`, `https://chat.ivxholding.com`, approved local dev origins
- GitHub pushes require orphan branch technique to exclude `.rork/history/` files with secrets
- Use `bunx` not `npx` (npx not allowed in sandbox)
- Samsung keyboard fix must use `visualViewport` API, `touch-action: manipulation`, `user-select: text`, `100dvh`/`100svh` viewport units
- EAS credentials (`EXPO_TOKEN`, `EXPO_PUBLIC_EAS_PROJECT_ID`) NOT available — user confirmed they don't have them
- App code is identical on Android and iOS — only deployment method differs
- Localtunnel URLs are temporary; user needs a more permanent download solution

## Progress
### Done
- **Owner auto-login removal FULLY DEPLOYED AND VERIFIED**: Commits `c67f8a2`, `e831c8d`, `e936eef`; 3 auto-login paths blocked in `auth-context.tsx`
- **Owner sign-in fix FULLY DEPLOYED — USER CONFIRMED WORKING**: Commit `d6dbfce` → GitHub `43be880c`
- **App color alignment DEPLOYED**: 784 hardcoded colors replaced across 104 Expo files
- **Enterprise Time Zone System DEPLOYED**: 69/69 tests pass, 17/17 API endpoints verified, 8 cities + DST verified
- **Reels card redesigned DEPLOYED**: commit `730aa4d`
- **Chat UX fixes DEPLOYED AND E2E VERIFIED**: commit `c0470a3`, 5/5 messages OK
- **IVX Registration Redesign DEPLOYED**: `IVXAuthCard.tsx` (~1900 lines), `expo/app/auth.tsx`
- **Birthday field DEPLOYED**: Backend validation 4/4 scenarios pass
- **Gender field DEPLOYED**: `GENDER_OPTIONS` chip selector, `VALID_GENDERS` Set in backend
- **Landing page 20-section QA completed — fixes deployed and verified**
- **Final closeout commit `3abaa17` DEPLOYED AND VERIFIED LIVE on Render**:
  - Backend SHA `3abaa17f` matches GitHub `3abaa17` (boot `2026-07-13T01:07:23.342Z`)
  - CORS: `access-control-allow-origin: https://ivxholding.com` (not `*`) — verified live
  - All routes 200: `/health`, `/api/ivx/properties/featured`, `/api/ivx/jv-deals`, `/api/ivx/landing-config`, `/api/ivx/analytics`
  - Protected routes: `/api/ivx/members` without auth → 401; Rate limiting: 5→401, 6th→429
  - Signup E2E: `userId=e39c1586-5560-4887-b707-f9512afa2a83` created successfully
- **Samsung chat keyboard fix DEPLOYED AND VERIFIED LIVE on `chat.ivxholding.com`**:
  - New bundle `entry-e11d8407f1045ab2380c1af32601e346.js` deployed `2026-07-13T01:47:24 UTC`
  - All keyboard fix functions confirmed in LIVE production bundle
  - Committed as `4573329`, pushed to GitHub as SHA `8ce4706` via orphan branch technique
  - Created `expo/hooks/useWebKeyboard.ts` (NEW): VisualViewport API hook, `injectWebKeyboardCSS()`, `scrollInputIntoView()`
- **Android OTA crash repair — CODE AND CONFIG COMPLETE, COMMITTED**:
  - Root cause: Old APK built with `updates.enabled: true` + `checkAutomatically: 'ON_LOAD'`
  - Fixed `app.config.ts`: version `1.3.0`, `updates.enabled: false`, `checkAutomatically: 'NEVER'`, `android.versionCode: 2`, `runtimeVersion: { policy: 'appVersion' }`, `buildMarker: IVX_BUNDLE_2026_07_13_OTA_REPAIR`
  - Created `expo/lib/ota-error-handler.ts`: `safelyCheckForUpdates()` — never throws, dynamic import
  - Rewrote `expo/lib/app-update-checker.ts`: non-fatal background check
  - Modified `app/_layout.tsx`: calls `checkForUpdates()` in `useEffect` with `.catch()`
  - `expo-updates@~0.26.0` removed — Kotlin version conflict; JS-level dynamic import handles missing module
  - Committed as `3e501cd` on `main`, pushed to origin (Rork internal)
- **Expo Go repair COMPLETED (server-side)**:
  - New tunnel `exp://k9xajm4-anonymous-8081.exp.direct` LIVE and verified
  - Deferred owner AI watchdog from startup to 3s after boot in `app/_layout.tsx`
- **APK BUILD #1 COMPLETED SUCCESSFULLY**:
  - `BUILD SUCCESSFUL in 2m 9s`, 424 actionable tasks, 125 executed, 299 up-to-date
  - APK: 79MB at `android/app/build/outputs/apk/release/app-release.apk`
  - Embedded JS bundle: 12.5MB (3837 modules) at `assets/index.android.bundle`
  - Verified: valid APK format, INTERNET permission present, no expo-updates in APK
  - Non-fatal OTA handler: 3 references found in embedded bundle
- **APK BUILD #2 COMPLETED SUCCESSFULLY** (after sandbox cleanup forced rebuild):
  - Sandbox cleaned up `android/` dir and `node_modules` — had to reinstall deps and redo prebuild
  - `bun install` — 1267 packages installed
  - `bunx expo prebuild --platform android --clean --no-install` — succeeded
  - Created fake watchman at `/tmp/fake-bin/watchman` (first build was stuck on "Waiting for Watchman `watch-project`")
  - `BUILD SUCCESSFUL in 1m 44s`, 424 actionable tasks, 69 executed, 355 up-to-date
  - APK: 79MB, embedded bundle 12.5MB (3837 modules), verified
- **APK download link shared with user via localtunnel**:
  - Multiple tunnel URLs created (all temporary): `gentle-places-vanish.loca.lt` (expired), `rich-nights-win.loca.lt` (expired), `eight-ghosts-slide.loca.lt` (404 — wrong dir), `lazy-beans-count.loca.lt` (latest, verified working)
  - User had trouble with localtunnel IP warning page — must enter sandbox public IP `136.66.153.202` to proceed
  - Confirmed this is NOT Expo Go — standalone APK with embedded bundle, works offline, no server needed
- **SafeVideo component CREATED (not yet integrated)**:
  - Created `expo/components/SafeVideo.tsx` — defensive wrapper around `expo-av` Video for Android stability
  - Disables poster on Android (known crash vector)
  - Falls back from HLS (.m3u8) to MP4 on Android (skips .m3u8 URIs)
  - Surfaces load errors via `onError` instead of crashing
  - Only plays when `ready` state is true
  - Unloads player on unmount to free native resources

### In Progress
- **Android reels crash fix**: `SafeVideo.tsx` created but NOT yet integrated into `app/videos.tsx` — need to replace `expo-av` `Video` imports/usage with `SafeVideo` component
- **APK rebuild needed**: After reels crash fix is integrated, must rebuild APK and share new download link
- **Samsung real device keyboard test**: need to verify keyboard opens on Samsung Internet at `chat.ivxholding.com/home`

### Blocked
- **EAS credentials not available**: `EXPO_TOKEN` and `EXPO_PUBLIC_EAS_PROJECT_ID` not set — cannot use `eas build` or `eas update`
- **GitHub remote not configured**: Only `origin` (Rork internal git router) — local commit `3e501cd` NOT pushed to GitHub
- **www.ivxholding.com does not 301 redirect to ivxholding.com** — requires Cloudflare DNS/page rule change
- **404 returns 200 on ivxholding.com** — S3 SPA fallback serves index.html for all paths
- **Landing HTML not redeployed to S3** — AWS credentials not available
- **Device QA NOT VERIFIED** — requires physical devices
- **Bundle size 37.6MB for Expo Go** — dev mode minimum
- **Render API credentials not in env** — relying on auto-deploy from GitHub push
- **Localtunnel URLs expire quickly** — user needs permanent hosting (S3, Google Drive, etc.) for APK distribution

## Key Decisions
- OTA crash fix: `updates.enabled: false` + `checkAutomatically: 'NEVER'` prevents native-level crash; JS-level `safelyCheckForUpdates()` via dynamic import provides optional non-fatal checking
- `expo-updates` removed from deps: Kotlin version conflict (needs 1.9.0, RN 0.81 uses 2.1.0)
- `android.versionCode` 1 → 2: Android treats as new version replacing broken APK
- Fake watchman binary (`/tmp/fake-bin/watchman`): returns synthetic JSON for `get-sockname`, `watch-project`, `version` — unblocks Metro cold builds in cloud sandbox (real watchman hangs on `watch-project`)
- Samsung keyboard fix: `useWebKeyboard` hook uses `window.visualViewport` resize/scroll events with 80px threshold
- Reels crash fix strategy: `SafeVideo` wrapper disables poster on Android, skips HLS `.m3u8` sources on Android (falls back to MP4), gates `shouldPlay` behind `ready` state, catches `onError` instead of crashing
- App is standalone (NOT Expo Go): `expo prebuild` + Gradle `assembleRelease` produces self-contained APK with embedded JS bundle
- iOS deployment requires Mac + Xcode or EAS Build (neither available); code is identical across platforms

## Next Steps
- Integrate `SafeVideo` into `app/videos.tsx` — replace `expo-av` `Video` with `SafeVideo` component
- Verify TypeScript passes for the changes
- Rebuild APK with `./gradlew assembleRelease --no-daemon` (with fake watchman in PATH)
- Verify APK and create new localtunnel download link
- Share APK download link with user
- Test Samsung Internet keyboard at `chat.ivxholding.com/home` on real device
- Push commit `3e501cd` to GitHub (need GitHub remote configured)
- Redeploy landing HTML to S3 (requires AWS credentials)

## Critical Context
- Git: `main` branch, HEAD `3e501cd` (OTA repair + keyboard fix), pushed to origin (Rork internal) but NOT pushed to GitHub
- `SafeVideo.tsx` is created but NOT yet wired into `videos.tsx` — reels will still crash until integration is done
- Reels crash root cause: `expo-av` Video on Android crashes with `posterSource`/`usePoster` + HLS `.m3u8` + multiple instances in FlatList
- Sandbox can be cleaned up at any time — `node_modules` and `android/` dir disappeared mid-session, forcing full rebuild
- Fake watchman MUST be in PATH for Gradle builds: `PATH="/tmp/fake-bin:$PATH" ./gradlew assembleRelease --no-daemon`
- Gradle build log: `/tmp/gradle-build5.log`, PID: `/tmp/gradle-pid5.txt`
- HTTP server for APK: `python3 -m http.server 8080` in APK release dir, PID at `/tmp/apk-server-pid.txt`
- Localtunnel: `bunx --yes localtunnel --port 8080`, PID at `/tmp/lt-pid.txt`, output at `/tmp/lt-output.txt`
- Current sandbox public IP: `136.66.153.202` (changes on sandbox restart)
- `expo-av` installed at `~16.0.8` — legacy video API, known Android stability issues

## Relevant Files
- `expo/app/videos.tsx` — reels screen, uses `expo-av` Video directly (crash source), needs SafeVideo integration
- `expo/components/SafeVideo.tsx` — NEW defensive video wrapper for Android stability (created, not yet integrated)
- `expo/lib/video-feed.ts` — `fetchVideoFeed()`, `fetchProjectReels()`, `FeedVideo` interface, `downloadFeedVideo()`
- `expo/lib/ota-error-handler.ts` — `safelyCheckForUpdates()`, never-throws OTA check via dynamic import
- `expo/lib/app-update-checker.ts` — calls `safelyCheckForUpdates()`, non-fatal
- `expo/app/_layout.tsx` — calls `checkForUpdates()` in useEffect, deferred owner AI modules 3s after boot
- `expo/app.config.ts` — version `1.3.0`, `updates.enabled: false`, `versionCode: 2`, `runtimeVersion: { policy: 'appVersion' }`
- `expo/eas.json` — channels: development, preview, production
- `expo/components/DealVideoCard.tsx` — navigates to `/videos` with `type: 'reel'` param
- `expo/app/admin/admin-reels.tsx` — admin reels management
- `/tmp/fake-bin/watchman` — fake watchman binary for cloud sandbox builds
- `expo/android/app/build/outputs/apk/release/app-release.apk` — 79MB release APK output location
